# ListFilterPlus

## Tags
filter, plus, options, add

## Categories
text, layout

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/list-filter-plus)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ListFilterPlus;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ListFilterPlus { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
